Query on-chain blockchain data using Dun: Query on-chain blockchain data using Dune Analytics SQL engine. Execute saved queries, fetch results, and build crypto analytics workflows.
Get your free API key at https://dune.co: Get your free API key at https://dune.com/apis
Execute a saved Dune query by its ID. Re: Execute a saved Dune query by its ID. Returns an execution ID that can be used to check status and fetch results.
The numeric ID of the Dune query to exec: The numeric ID of the Dune query to execute (found in the query URL)
Optional key-value parameters to pass to: Optional key-value parameters to pass to the query (for parameterized queries)
Check the current status of a query exec: Check the current status of a query execution. Returns the state (e.g. QUERY_STATE_PENDING, QUERY_STATE_EXECUTING, QUERY_STATE_COMPLETED).
The execution ID returned from the Execu: The execution ID returned from the Execute Query action
Fetch the results of a completed query e: Fetch the results of a completed query execution. Use after the execution status shows QUERY_STATE_COMPLETED.
Maximum number of rows to return (1-1000: Maximum number of rows to return (1-1000)
Number of rows to skip for pagination: Number of rows to skip for pagination
Get the latest cached results for a quer: Get the latest cached results for a query without triggering a new execution. This is the fastest and most cost-effective option for retrieving query data.
The numeric ID of the Dune query (found: The numeric ID of the Dune query (found in the query URL)
Optional filter expression to apply to r: Optional filter expression to apply to results (e.g. "block_time > 2023-01-01")
Cancel a running query execution. Use th: Cancel a running query execution. Use this to stop long-running queries that are no longer needed.
The execution ID of the running query to: The execution ID of the running query to cancel
